one_time_description: Gain on disposal of tangible capital assets ($143,152) and gain from water treatment plant insurance proceeds ($124,746) following prior year fire loss
economic_notes: First Nation has an 8.3% interest in Keseechiwan Holdings Inc. (Swift Current Casino Development). Holds non-controlling interest in 2544737 Ontario Limited (soft drink and ice manufacturing). Investment in Cree Land Mini-Mart Limited Partnership via Piapot First Nation Business Trust. QVIDA flood claim pending against Government of Canada.
notes: Fiscal year end March 31, 2020 - not 2024. Province is Saskatchewan (Treaty 4 Territory). Consolidated entity includes 7 fully consolidated subsidiaries plus 1 GBE (Cree Land Mini-Mart Limited Partnership via Business Trust) accounted for by modified equity method. Emphasis of Matter in audit report regarding QVIDA flood claim loan against Government of Canada - contingent asset not recognized. Water treatment plant burned down in FY2019; insurance proceeds of $124,746 received in FY2020. ISC total per Note 15 reconciliation is $13,830,386 (per confirmation $18,458,480 adjusted for deferred revenue movements). Total government transfers estimated to include ISC ($13,830,386) + FNIHB ($1,018,906) + CMHC Subsidy ($731,026) = $15,580,318; OSR includes earnings from Nation partnership, First Nations Trust, FHQ, QBOW, rental, Enbridge, interest etc. Bank indebtedness of $223,467 included in current liabilities. No schedule of remuneration provided in extracted text.
